creator: seth@psychotic.aberrant.org
text:
The link that's referenced by "http://www.freebsd-corp-net-guide.com/" on
this page has a typo in the actual link.  It points to
"http://wwww.freebsd-corp-net-guide.com", which doesn't exist.

I hope that docs is the right group for webpage issues.  I guess it could
be advocacy....

Fix: 

Change the link to point to www.freebsd-corp-net-guide.com.
How-To-Repeat: 
click on the link.
